ai_summary: Gujarat Fluorochemicals Limited (GFCL) has incorporated a new wholly-owned subsidiary, GFCL Semiconductor and Advanced Materials Limited, signaling a strategic entry into the capital-intensive semiconductor and advanced materials sector. While the initial equity subscription is a modest Rs. 1 Lakh, this diversification represents a significant long-term strategic shift from its core specialty chemicals business, implying potentially substantial future capital expenditures to establish capabilities in this high-tech industry.
